meaning: n.俘虏,被美色或爱情迷住的人adj.被俘的,被迷住的
examples: They were taken captive by masked gunmen.
Children come to zoos precisely to see captive animals.
Her heart had begun to pound inside her chest like a captive animal.
The web is live 24-hours a day with a captive audience at all times.
Fortunately, a British games and advertising company, Captive Media, has come up with a solution.
